segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
Tell the Israelites: I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't follow the ways of Egypt where you used to live, and don't follow the ways of Canaan where I'm going to take you. Don't adopt their practices.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Do what I tell you and keep my rules. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If you keep my rules and do what I tell you, you will live. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with a close relative.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't shame your father by having sex with your mother. She is your mother; don't have sex with her.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with any of your father's wives and shame your father.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with your sister,  whether she's your father's daughter or your mother's daughter, or whether she was born in the same house as you or somewhere else.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with your granddaughter, your son's daughter or your daughter's daughter, because that would be a shameful thing for you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with the daughter of any of your father's wives or the daughter of your father. She is your sister.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with your father's sister. She is a close relative of your father.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with your mother's sister. She is a close relative of your mother.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't bring shame on your uncle by having sex with his wife. She is your aunt.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with your daughter-in-law. She is your son's wife. Don't have sex with her.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with your brother's wife and bring shame on your brother.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with both a woman and her daughter. Don't have sex with her son's daughter or her daughter's daughter. They are her close relatives. That is something I loathe.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't marry your wife's sister and have sex with her while your wife is still alive. They will be hostile wives to one other.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with a woman during the time she is unclean because of her period.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't commit any sex act with any other man's wife. This would pollute you and make you unclean.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't give any of your children as a human sacrifice to Molech,  for you must not disgrace the character of your God. I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with a man as with a woman. That is something disgusting.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't have sex with any animal. This would pollute you and make you unclean.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: A woman must not give herself to an animal to have sex with it. That is something disgusting. Don't pollute yourselves and make yourselves unclean by doing anything like this. That's the reason I'm expelling these nations from the land—they polluted themselves because of all these practices.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Even the land has become polluted, so I am punishing it for the sins committed by the people who live there, and the land will vomit them out.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You, however, must do what I tell you and keep my rules. You must not do any of these disgusting acts, whether an Israelite or a foreigner living among you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The people who lived in the land before you practiced all these disgusting things, and the land became polluted.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: If you pollute the land, it will vomit you out just like it did the nations before you.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Consequently anyone who does any of these disgusting things must be expelled from their people.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You must accept my demand that you don't follow any of these disgusting practices done before you arrived. Don't pollute yourselves and make yourselves unclean. I am the Lord your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD
